/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/cross-os_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/cross-os_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_Main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/cross-os_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/cross-os_main_qml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cross-os.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_cross-os_raw_qml_0.cpp.o" -o cross-os  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
